data.title: Bitcoin stable at $88,000 amid preference for metals. 129,968 traders liquidated in 24 hours for $569.98 million. Binance Founder bullish.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently stable at around $88,000 amid ongoing institutional preference for metals over cryptocurrencies. The current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) at $88,237.22, Ethereum (ETH) at $2,929.87, Solana (SOL) at $124.53, XRP at $1.91, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.1226, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.057755. Recent data from Coinglass indicates that 129,968 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, resulting in losses totaling $569.98 million. Among the top gainers in the last 24 hours are Pump.fun, River, and Hyperliquid. Binance Founder Changpeng Zhao continues to express optimism for 2026, predicting a bullish cycle where Bitcoin "will probably break" strategy. Additionally, a notable purchase of 2,932 Bitcoin for $264 million has been made. For more details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Plumbing expert Phil Sturges discusses camera inspections for slow drains in home. Catalina Foothills, Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: In Catalina Foothills, Arizona on January 26, 2026, a recent article in HelloNation explores the root causes behind slow drains or repetitive clogs in households. The piece highlights the expertise of Phil Sturges, a Plumbing Specialist and proprietor of PlumbZona Plumbing in Catalina Foothills.

data.title: KBRA assigns preliminary ratings to 56 classes of mortgage-backed notes in PMT Loan Trust 2026-CNF1, with $302.4 million balance.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 56 classes of mortgage-backed notes from PMT Loan Trust 2026-CNF1, a prime RMBS transaction sponsored by PennyMac Corp. This trust comprises 576 conforming mortgage loans with a total stated principal balance of around $302.4 million as of January 1, 2026. PennyMac, an indirect wholly-owned subsidiary of PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust, is the sponsor of this transaction.

data.title: Dow Jones rises; Trump threatens new tariffs on Canada. Tesla stock drops; CoreWeave surges. Gold hits milestone.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase despite President Trump's announcement of potential new tariffs on Canada. While Tesla stock declined, CoreWeave saw a significant jump in its value. In other news, the price of gold surpassed a significant milestone, and a rare earth company experienced a surge in its stock price due to a specific development. This news was covered live under the title "Stock Market Today: Dow Rises As Gold Clears A Milestone; Rare Earth Play Surges On This News."

data.title: HPE partners with 2degrees in New Zealand for AI innovation on private cloud platform, with focus on data sovereignty.
data.description: In Auckland, New Zealand, HPE (NYSE: HPE) has revealed a key partnership with 2degrees, a prominent telecommunications and technology company in the region. This collaboration aims to accelerate AI-driven progress by establishing a specialized private AI platform using HPE Private Cloud AI. The innovative solution will streamline and update 2degrees’ technology infrastructure, establishing a sovereign, cohesive, and adaptable platform that enables the company to offer more nimble and scalable solutions.

data.title: Human Development Fund and Palmer Family Foundation launch "Roots of Recovery" program in Jamaica to revitalize agriculture sector post hurricane.
data.description: In Canton, Michigan, the Human Development Fund (HDF) has recently unveiled their new relief project named "Roots of Recovery" on January 26, 2026. This initiative aims to rejuvenate Jamaica's agricultural industry after significant damage caused by recent events.

data.title: VanEck introduces new crypto ETF for AVAX, amid pending approval for other Avalanche ETFs, providing spot exposure for investors.
data.description: The recently introduced fund provides exchange-traded access to AVAX, amidst ongoing regulatory evaluation of other proposed Avalanche ETFs.

data.title: Operation Healing Forces joins Stand Together Foundation's Catalyst Ignite Experience, a network of nonprofits. Tampa, Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: Operation Healing Forces has recently become a part of a prestigious group of nonprofits focused on tackling major issues in the country. Based in Tampa, Florida, the organization, which supports members of the United States Special Operations Forces, made this significant development on January 26, 2026.

data.title: Best Cigar Prices and AJ Fernandez team up to launch exclusive Barn Cured cigars, highlighting air-curing tradition.
data.description: In an announcement made on January 26, 2026, in Drums, Pennsylvania, Best Cigar Prices has collaborated with AJ Fernandez to introduce a new exclusive cigar named Barn Cured. Greg Fox, the CEO of Best Cigar Prices, emphasized the significance of air-curing tobacco leaves in barns, which is a traditional but often underappreciated aspect of cigar production. This partnership aims to highlight the importance of this method in enhancing the quality of cigars.

data.title: United Fire Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: UFCS) to release Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 10 & earnings call on Feb 11 at 9am CT.
data.description: Today in Cedar Rapids, Iowa, United Fire Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: UFCS) revealed that their fourth quarter 2025 earnings report is set for release post-market closure on Tuesday, February 10, 2026. Subsequently, an earnings call is scheduled for Wednesday, February 11, at 9 a.m. CT. During this call, management will delve into the company's performance during the fourth quarter of 2025, providing insights for securities analysts, shareholders, and other concerned individuals.

data.title: Monster Energy's snow sports team wins big at X Games Aspen 2026 with 27 medals (10 Gold, 11 Silver, 6 Bronze), including full podium sweep in Women's Snowboard Slopestyle.
data.description: In the recently concluded 25th Winter X Games held in Colorado, Team Monster Energy put on an impressive performance by winning a total of 27 medals over three days of intense competition. Their medal count consisted of 10 gold, 11 silver, and 6 bronze medals. Particularly noteworthy was their domination in the Women's Snowboard Slopestyle event, where they secured a full podium sweep. Mia Brookes clinched the gold medal, Zoi Sadowski-Synnott earned the silver, and Cocomo Murase claimed the bronze. This exceptional achievement showcased the team's talent and dedication in the world of winter sports.

data.title: AxioMed's viscoelastic disc prevents wear failures, supported by JBJS data. Next-gen solution in spinal arthroplasty.
data.description: Newly published research in The Journal of Bone and Joint Surgery® (JBJS) provides further support for AxioMed's viscoelastic disc as an innovative method in spinal arthroplasty. AxioMed, backed by KIC Ventures, revealed the release of a study that solidifies the scientific basis for their next-generation approach. The study highlights the effectiveness of AxioMed's disc in improving spinal health, with a particular focus on enhancing patient outcomes. This publication adds to the growing body of evidence supporting the use of AxioMed's viscoelastic disc in spinal surgeries, reinforcing its position as a leading solution in the field.
